title: Consolidate parse_zec_to_zatoshi + zatoshi_to_zec_string into nie-core
description:
## What
Move the two identical parse/format helpers from cli and tui into nie-core, so they have one canonical implementation.

## Where the duplicates are
- cli/src/commands.rs: parse_zec_to_zatoshi (lines ~3255-3273), zatoshi_to_zec_string (lines ~3279-3291)
- tui/src/event.rs: parse_zec_to_zatoshi (lines ~942-961), zatoshi_to_zec_string (lines ~963-971)
Both are identical. Neither is pub in their current crates.

## Algorithm
1. Create core/src/amount.rs with pub fn parse_zec_to_zatoshi(s: &str) -> Result<u64, String> and pub fn zatoshi_to_zec_string(zatoshi: u64) -> String
2. Re-export from core/src/lib.rs: pub use amount::{parse_zec_to_zatoshi, zatoshi_to_zec_string};
3. In cli/src/commands.rs: remove the local definitions, add use nie_core::{parse_zec_to_zatoshi, zatoshi_to_zec_string};
4. In tui/src/event.rs: same removal and import
5. cargo build --workspace must pass with no warnings

## Defensive programming
- The function bodies are already correct (integer-only, no floats) — copy verbatim, do not rewrite
- Add #[cfg(test)] tests in core/src/amount.rs with the parse vectors from the epic (0.001→100_000, 1.0→100_000_000, too-many-decimals→Err)
- No unwrap() in the implementation

## Tests (in core/src/amount.rs)
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("0.001") == Ok(100_000) -- oracle: 0.001 * 10^8 = 100,000
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("1") == Ok(100_000_000) -- oracle: 1 ZEC = 10^8 zatoshi
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("1.0") == Ok(100_000_000)
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("0.00000001") == Ok(1) -- minimum zatoshi
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("0.000000001").is_err() -- 9 decimal places rejected
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("").is_err()
- parse_zec_to_zatoshi("-1").is_err()
- zatoshi_to_zec_string(100_000) == "0.001"
- zatoshi_to_zec_string(100_000_000) == "1"
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace passes. parse_zec_to_zatoshi and zatoshi_to_zec_string are pub in nie_core. No duplicate definitions remain in cli or tui. cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings is clean.
close_reason: parse_zec_to_zatoshi + zatoshi_to_zec_string moved to core/src/amount.rs; cli and tui now import from nie_core; all tests pass
